isi.lyrics:
Lyric Sik-K - STAY on FIRE (feat. DEAN)

Romanization

It’s 5 in the morning, I’m up
nan bonae bukkeureoun pyojeongui emojis
neon mot kkeongneun geol alji nae gojip
neon bonae bukkeureoun pyojeongui emojis
nan soljikhage da teoreonoji
seoro bappeunikka geunyang hoksi
janeun siganeun gyeopchil sudo itji
mimmanghameuro tteokchiril sudo itji
bukkeureoun deuthaejyeo gonggineun deowojyeo
neon dolgo dolji i nyeoseok jeo nyeoseokhante
i jip jeo jip, i bang hwajangsire, jeo bang chimdae wi
yeongyeok pyosiro deoreophyeo
Ayo pineapple pu**y yeah
neomu mana jeup juice
Pineapple pu**y
neomu dara geuge kkeut
oraemmaniya tteoreojyeo kkul
oraemmaniya an kkeojyeo bul

Stay on fire, on some crazy s**t
Gotta make you believe me
No kizzy
Let’s stay on fire, on some crazy s**t
Gotta make you believe me
No kizzy

jom gwahage dallabuteun white tee

neon nae myujeu, naui aidieo
sumaneun ganeungseong show me right here
deo yahage neodapge my dear
geudaeumen malhae I need you right here
nae ane pantajireul jageuksikyeo
I can’t stay cool
You know that I can’t hate you
When you’re naked for me

She’s on fire, on some crazy s**t
Just make me believe
Make me believe you
Let’s stay on fire, on some crazy s**t
Then I’ll make you believe me
No kizzy

Let’s stay on fire, on some crazy s**t
Gotta make you believe me


Hangeul

It’s 5 in the morning, I’m up
난 보내 부끄러운 표정의 emojis
넌 못 꺾는 걸 알지 내 고집
넌 보내 부끄러운 표정의 emojis

서로 바쁘니까 그냥 혹시
자는 시간은 겹칠 수도 있지
민망함으로 떡칠일 수도 있지

영역 표시로 더럽혀
Ayo pineapple pu**y yeah
너무 많아 즙 juice
Pineapple pu**y
너무 달아 그게 끝
오랜만이야 떨어져 꿀
오랜만이야 안 꺼져 불

Stay on fire, on some crazy s**t
Gotta make you believe me

나는 남겨 아이디를

내 안에 판타지를 자극시켜

Just make me believe
